payload.label: pillow
payload.long_description: Plump rectangular beige-and-light-brown horizontally striped fabric pillow with a woven texture, slightly rumpled and pressed flat at the front; the pillow is partially edge-cropped in the image and appears in the foreground at approximately 0.6 meters from the camera.
